title: Adopt zone tinting and fill database tops
description: Adopt the zone-tinted Overview experiment and fix database cylinder rendering so the top ellipse uses the same node fill color instead of remaining white.
decision_notes: Zone-tinted overview rendering is accepted as the intended direction.
Database nodes now render an explicit top-fill ellipse using --archmap-node-fill so zone-colored database components are visually consistent.
The top outline remains separate so selected/emphasized stroke styling still works.
